provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Ntlo ya Dikgosi (Powers and Privileges) Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the Chairperson of the Ntlo ya Dikgosi , and includes any other Member when such other Member is presiding at a meeting of the Ntlo ya Dikgosi
any Member of the Ntlo ya Dikgosi
the Ntlo ya Dikgosi established by section 77(1) of the Constitution

definitions.term: officer of the Ntlo ya Dikgosi
definitions.definition: the Secretary or any other person acting as an officer of the Ntlo ya Dikgosi under the orders of the Chairperson within the precincts of the Ntlo ya Dikgosi , and includes any member of the Botswana Police Force on duty within the precincts of the Ntlo ya Dikgosi
